title: PartyIdentificationTypeValues
description: Specifies the type of alternate identification which can be used to give an alternate identification of the party identified. ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: TaxIdentificationNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a tax authority to an entity.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NationalRegistrationNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a national registration authority to an entity. In Singapore this is known as the NRIC. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: RegistrationAuthorityIdentification
x-enumeration-literals.description: An identifier for the Legal Entity in a business registry in the jurisdiction of legal registration, or in the appropriate registration authority. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: AlienRegistrationNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a government agency to identify foreign nationals.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PassportNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a passport authority.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TaxExemptIdentificationNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned to a tax exempt entity.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CorporateIdentification
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned to a corporate entity.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DriverLicenseNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned to a driver's license.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ForeignInvestmentIdentityNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned to a foreign investor (other than the alien number).

x-enumeration-literals.name: SocialSecurityNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a social security agency.

x-enumeration-literals.name: IdentityCardNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by a national authority to an identity card.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Concat
x-enumeration-literals.description: Number assigned by an issuer to identify a customer via the concatenation of the birthdate and characters of the first name and surname.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NationalRegistrationIdentificationNumber
x-enumeration-literals.description: National registration identification number. In Singapore this is known as the NRIC.
